codebookKey.description: The key of the Codebook for the Question.

id.description:
The id of the Question.

The id is unique by case-insensitive comparison across all Questions in this Study.

Note that the id may be changed by the user, so while it uniquely identifies the Question at a given time, it is not guaranteed to remain unchanged for the lifetime of the Question.

countResponses.description: The number of Responses in this Question.

countResponsesCoded.description: The number of Responses in this Question that have at least one Code applied.

countTranscriptions.description: The number of Responses in this Question that have transcriptions.

countTranslations.description: The number of Responses in this Question that have translations.

countQualityReviewed.description: The number of Responses in this question that are quality reviewed

label.description:
The label for the Question, which may be empty.

The label is used as a short identifier for the Question in reports when the full id of the Question would be too long.

text.description: The text of the Question posed to the respondent, which may be empty.

help.description: The help information for the Question, which may be empty.

sortOrder.description: Ordinal number of the Question. It uses for sorting questions in list, tables, so on.
